description: SKILL.md §2 SMART ROUTING contains an extra 'Scoped Guard and Loading' subsection (lines ~191-215) not in the canonical skill_smart_router.md pattern. The subsection clarifies load-bearing logic and reads cleanly. Per ADR-005 (operator-override cascade), preserved as documented deviation — content adds value, removing would risk regression.
recommended_fix: Preserve as documented value-add deviation. ADR-005 records the operator-override decision.

description: SKILL.md §2 lacked the 'Phase Detection' subsection in the template-prescribed position. Phase Detection table existed at end of §2; moved to between Resource Loading Levels and Smart Router Pseudocode per ADR-005 operator-override cascade. FIXED via Edit.

SKILL.md line 102 referenced `.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts`. This path no longer exists — the file moved to `.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts` per v1.12.0.0 changelog (arc 118 FULL_ISOLATE_NO_MCP migration). FIXED via Edit.

loop_protocol.md line 214 referenced `.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts`. Same path drift as AF-0003 — file moved to deep-loop-runtime per v1.12.0.0. FIXED via Edit. Note: loop_protocol.md:226 also mentions `executor-config.ts` but without full path (just the filename in code-context); that reference resolves correctly via implicit current-skill scope.
evidence: post-fix grep confirms zero remaining non-historical stale refs

description: state_format.md:745 referenced fictional `.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_review_auto.yaml`; line 770 referenced fictional `spec_kit_deep-research_review_auto.yaml:511`. Both replaced with real `deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml` per operator override. FIXED via Edit.
recommended_fix: Replace fictional yaml paths with real existing yaml. RESOLVED.

description: quick_reference.md intro shortened to one sentence; operational guidance absorbed into §1.OVERVIEW. FIXED via Edit.
capability_matrix.md §1.OVERVIEW restructured with '### Purpose' and '### Machine-Readable Source of Truth' H3 subsections. FIXED via Edit.

Two duplicate DR-IDs resolved by renaming: 04--convergence/029-insight-status-prevents-false-stuck.md → 034-... (DR-029→DR-034) and 06--synthesis/027-resource-map-emission.md → 035-... (DR-027 alias→DR-035). Root playbook entries + internal file IDs updated. FIXED via git mv + sed + Edit.
evidence: grep ^### DR-[0-9]+ unique pass; 41/41 root entries match 41 files
recommended_fix: Rename duplicates to free slots. RESOLVED.

description: 7 unlinked per-feature files now have root entries: DR-035 added to §12 SYNTHESIS; new §13 COMMAND FLOW STRESS TESTS section added with CP-046 through CP-051. Existing §13 and §14 renumbered to §14 and §15. OVERVIEW count updated from 34 to 41 scenarios across 7 categories. FIXED via Edit.
evidence: §13 COMMAND FLOW STRESS TESTS now present at line 599

description: All 17 changelog files start directly with the summary paragraph and lack YAML frontmatter. Verified against sk-doc template: this is CONFORMANT per `assets/changelog_template.md` line 31 ('Files start directly with the summary paragraph - no version header or boilerplate'). NO ACTION required.
evidence: head -5 of v1.1.0.0 and v1.12.0.0 both start with prose
recommended_fix: No action — current changelog format conforms to sk-doc convention. Original audit flag was based on a wrong assumption that all skill docs require frontmatter.

description: REVERIFIED: sk-doc changelog_template.md compact format explicitly permits release-specific subsection headers (e.g. `#### Validation Coverage`, `#### Runtime Truth Foundation`). The variance across the 17 historical changelogs is sk-doc-compliant per-release categorization, NOT a deviation. Original finding was based on a stricter assumption than the template requires. NO ACTION needed.
evidence: sk-doc/assets/changelog_template.md:46-49 shows `#### {Category Name}` as the per-release subsection pattern
existing v1.5.0.0 #### Runtime Truth Foundation (Phase 1) and v1.10.0.0 are valid examples of the pattern
recommended_fix: No action — sk-doc convention is satisfied by release-specific category subsections. Reclassified from deferred to false-positive after template re-read.

description: Initial audit flagged DEFAULT_CAPABILITY_PATH at scripts/runtime-capabilities.cjs:19 as missing target. VERIFIED FALSE — file EXISTS at .opencode/skills/deep-research/assets/runtime_capabilities.json (1783 bytes). NO ACTION required.

Initial audit flagged missing packet_id and parent_id fields. VERIFIED FALSE — skill graph-metadata.json uses a different schema (schema_version: 2) with skill_id, family, category, edges.depends_on, edges.siblings, manual.depends_on, manual.related_to. Audit scope mixed up spec-folder graph-metadata schema (which uses packet_id + parent_id) with skill graph-metadata schema (which uses skill_id + edges). NO ACTION required.
evidence: skill_graph_compiler.py validation PASSED in earlier run
recommended_fix: No action — current schema is correct for skill graph-metadata.

description: All 5 asset files audited (deep_research_strategy.md, deep_research_dashboard.md, deep_research_config.json, runtime_capabilities.json, prompt_pack_iteration.md.tmpl) PASS template conformance. Valid JSON, correct sections, frontmatter present where applicable.

evidence: agent batch C report: 16 files PASS

description: README.md structural audit complete. Extra sections LIFECYCLE MODES + RUNTIME PARITY are skill-specific justified extensions; section order otherwise matches template. Phase 3 (next phase) owns the full rewrite — this finding will be incorporated into the phase-3 README rewrite scope rather than fixed standalone in phase 2.

description: scripts/README.md is a code-folder navigation README, intentionally narrower than skill_readme_template.md. Authorized deviation by design.
